audit_items.proof_trace: Lines 128-130 enforce `hash == GPv2Order.hash(order, i_gpV2Settlement.domainSeparator())` as the second gate in `isValidSignature`; any mismatch reverts with `InvalidOrderId`. Since `i_gpV2Settlement` is immutable and this check precedes all subsequent logic with no alternate path, the property holds on every non-reverting execution.
